statement.title: HarmonyPalette Privacy Statement
statement.summary: HarmonyPalette processes color data locally on the device for palette design and favorites storage.

items.name: Photo selection
items.purpose: Allow the user to pick an image and extract dominant colors.
items.storage: Processed locally and not uploaded by the app.

items.name: Favorites storage
items.storage: Stored locally in the app database on the device.

items.name: Clipboard copy
data: Color strings selected by the user
items.storage: Written to the system clipboard only when requested by the user.
